title: Apple at 50: Where did the tech giant succeed and fail?
description: On the tech giant's 50th year, we ask analysts to give their top three Apple successes and misses
content:
Few companies have managed to define how people use technology in their everyday lives as resoundingly as Apple.
The company, which celebrated its 50th birthday this week, was started by two Steves in a San Franciscan garage. It has had some truly st... [4480 chars]

title: Deontay Wilder beats battling Derek Chisora as epic bout goes the distance
description: Deontay Wilder consigned British heavyweight Derek Chisora to defeat in his final bout but only after an exhilarating fight-of-the-year contender in London
content: Deontay Wilder consigned the British heavyweight Derek Chisora to defeat in his final bout but only after an exhilarating fight-of-the-year contender at a raucous O2 Arena. In the 50th bout of Chisora’s eventful professional career, Del Boy showed re... [3161 chars]

title: Man charged over fatal shooting of baby Kaori Patterson-Moore in pram in New York
description: Two men have been arrested over the shooting of a seven-month-old baby in Williamsburg.
content:
A man has been charged with murder after a seven-month-old baby died after being shot while sitting in her pushchair in New York.
Amuri Greene, 21, has been charged with three counts of murder and one of attempted murder after police accused him of f... [714 chars]

title: Keir Starmer 'deeply concerned' by Kanye West's Wireless festival booking 'despite antisemitic remarks'
description: The rapper will headline all three nights of London's Wireless festival, just over a year after posting "I love Hitler" and "I'm a Nazi" on X.
content:
The prime minister has said it is "deeply concerning" that Kanye West has been booked for a London music festival "despite his previous antisemitic remarks and celebration of Nazism".

title: Porsche 968 Club Sport | Spotted
description: We're used to racy 911s being valuable - now it's the turn of the 968
content: It’s a close run thing, but probably Porsche is still the best out there at making road racer sports cars. The kind of things that are as thrilling on the circuit as they are the street, that are built tough enough to endure years of track days, and ... [3422 chars]
